summary: F-LOW DC7: parse_session_u16 wrapped an out-of-range AUTH_SERIAL_NUM with `as u16`; it now rejects through the existing typed session-field error. The fix and its tests are driver-side; this artifact binds the exact driver commit into the oraclemcp tracker.

verification: mutation: restoring the `as u16` cast fails auth_serial_num_out_of_u16_range_is_rejected_not_wrapped
